codeReview.summary: Reviewed the original failing planner change and the follow-up fix. The fix removes the repo-sensitive implicit `max(desired, 4)` escalation from `Cerberus.Router.determine_panel_size/5` while leaving explicit broadening via required reviewers intact, and it adds router/engine regressions that cover docs-only public-contract repos, test-only security-sensitive repos, and an explicit routing override broadening case. That addresses the prior blocking contract violation, and I did not find any new high-confidence correctness or contract issues in the reviewed scope.

summary: Reviewed the original failed feature, the fix handoff/transcript skeleton, the worker skill, shared-state files, and commits `73dcc4ac0bc0ef31a5b2ff70729a9d44a6c78112` and `774f83c799983b5cce08c3e8bca21437a2f7f6d2`. The fix adequately resolves the prior blocking issue: docs-only and test-only changes now keep their minimal teams in repo-sensitive repositories unless routing config explicitly broadens coverage, and the new regression tests lock that behavior in.
